heading: Authorization of appropriations for cotton ginning studies
label: 2122 Authorization of appropriations for cotton ginning studies
text: For the purposes of there is authorized to be appropriated, after , out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, such sums as may be necessary.section 2121 of this titleJune 30, 1931
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 425 of this titleSection was enacted as part of , and not as part of the Cotton Research and Promotion Act which comprises this chapter.act Apr. 19, 1930, ch. 203
